summary: Iteration 130: Testing NEW features - Badge notification toasts, Email-based password reset via Emailit, Rewards Store API with JWT cross-site auth. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Store token JWT correctly includes iss='crosscurrent-hub', aud='crosscurrent-store', 10-min expiry
store-verify and store-deduct correctly require X-Internal-Api-Key header for security
forgot-password endpoint returns generic message (security best practice) and no longer returns token in response
Password reset email is sent via Emailit integration (confirmed working)
badges/check endpoint returns newly_awarded list for toast notifications
LoginPage correctly handles reset_token URL param to auto-open dialog at token step
MyRewardsPage StoreButton calls /rewards/store-token API and opens store_url in new tab
BadgesSection correctly calls /badges/check on mount for toast notifications
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 130 tested 3 new features: (1) Badge toast notifications via POST /badges/check returning newly_awarded list, (2) Email-based password reset via POST /forgot-password (sends email via Emailit, no token in response) and POST /reset-password, (3) Rewards Store API with 3 endpoints: /store-token (JWT auth), /store-verify (internal key), /store-deduct (internal key). The MyRewardsPage at /my-rewards shows 'Open Rewards & Store' button that generates store token. LoginPage handles ?reset_token=xxx URL param to auto-open forgot password dialog at token step. All 16 backend tests passed.

store_token.returns: token (signed JWT), store_url (with token param), expires_in

store_verify.returns: valid (bool), user object with id, email, name, level, lifetime_points, available_balance

forgot_password.behavior: Sends email via Emailit, returns generic message (security), does NOT return token in response

badge_check.returns: user_id, newly_awarded (list of badge names for toast notifications)

login_forgot_password.button_text: Send Reset Link (correct, not 'Request Reset Token')
login_forgot_password.url_param: ?reset_token=xxx auto-opens dialog at token step with token pre-filled

my_rewards_store_button.behavior: Calls POST /rewards/store-token, opens store_url in new tab

my_rewards_badges_section.features: Calls /badges/check on mount, shows toast for newly_awarded badges, shows 0/14 earned with locked badge grid
